metadata.note: Sub-case A2: the toponym is the gate. centroid_ids={ASIA-PAKISTAN}, primary_target NULL. 'Baloch' word-STARTs so it already covers Balochistan/Baloch/Balochistan's -- listing both is redundant. Pre-audited 2026-07-17: bare toponym runs ~85% on-topic in Pakistan scope (Greenland-class ~95%, Pacific-class ~63%); the ~15% residual is road accidents and earthquakes datelined Balochistan, accepted rather than lose the insurgency corpus, and re-checked at the measure step. Iranian Sistan-Baluchestan leak measured at 6 co-tagged titles -- not material. DROPPED: 'CPEC' (7 hits, all China-Pakistan economic-corridor diplomacy, not the insurgency); 'insurgency' (generic, n=2, both US mineral-investment stories, 100% foreign). Dead: BLF, Jaffar Express, Makran, Levies. 'BLA' is SAFE here (all-caps, <=4 chars -> case-sensitive whole-word acronym path, so it does not touch blast/blame) but must never appear in a non-EN list, where the substring path would.
